ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the race */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the race within the season */,
  "circuit_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the circuit where the race is held */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Time of the race */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "number_of_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* A text description of the weather conditions */,
  "weather_warm" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was warm */,
  "weather_cold" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was cold */,
  "weather_dry" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was dry */,
  "weather_wet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was wet */,
  "weather_cloudy" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was cloudy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the driver */,
  "driver_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "driver_height" REAL /* Height of the driver in meters */,
  "driver_weight" REAL /* Weight of the driver in kilograms */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number of the driver */,
  "driver_join_date" TEXT /* Date the driver joined the racing organization */,
  "driver_retirement_date" TEXT /* Date the driver retired (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructors" (
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constructor */,
  "constructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the constructor */,
  "constructor_founded_date" TEXT /* Date the constructor was founded */,
  "constructor_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the constructor's headquarters */,
  "constructor_chief_technical_officer" TEXT /* Name of the chief technical officer */,
  "constructor_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the main sponsor */,
  "constructor_championships" INTEGER /* Number of constructor championships won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constructor */,
  "grid_position" INTEGER /* Grid position of the driver */,
  "podium_finish" INTEGER /* Podium finish position of the driver */,
  "driver_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver in the race */,
  "driver_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the driver in the season */,
  "driver_standings_pos" INTEGER /* Current standings position of the driver */,
  "constructor_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the constructor in the race */,
  "constructor_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the constructor in the season */,
  "constructor_standings_pos" INTEGER /* Current standings position of the constructor */,
  "qualifying_time" REAL /* Qualifying time of the driver */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Total race time of the driver */,
  "fastest_lap" TEXT /* Fastest lap time of the driver in the race */,
  "laps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the driver */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver at the end of the race */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Number of pit stops made by the driver */,
  "fuel_usage" REAL /* Total fuel usage in liters */,
  "tyre_compound" TEXT /* Tyre compound used during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_constructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("constructor_id") REFERENCES constructors ("constructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the circuit (city or town) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the circuit is located */,
  "circuit_length" REAL /* Length of the circuit in kilometers */,
  "circuit_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in a typical race at this circuit */,
  "circuit_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the circuit in meters */,
  "circuit_track_layout" TEXT /* Track layout of the circuit */,
  "circuit_surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the circuit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "weather_warm" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was warm */,
  "weather_cold" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was cold */,
  "weather_dry" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was dry */,
  "weather_wet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was wet */,
  "weather_cloudy" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weather was cloudy */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the race in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity during the race in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the race in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction during the race */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Amount of rainfall during the race in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)
